title: Lore – give your coding agent the decisions your team made
abstract: Lore is your programming assistant with a heart! It remembers all the decisions made by you and your team, ready to help whenever you need code assistance. Just ask, "Hey Lore, how did we solve this issue last time?" and it will pull up the relevant discussions and documentation. Say goodbye to endless searches through code forests—Lore is here to assist you! 🌟
abstract_zh: Lore，你的编程小助手终于不再是冷冰冰的了！它会记住你和团队的所有讨论决定，每次你需要代码帮助时，直接问“嘿，Lore，上次我们是怎么解决这个问题的？”它就能把历史决策、文档通通给你找出来。告别迷路在代码森林的无尽搜索，让Lore陪你一起 coding！🌟
